a: At the end of the semester
explanation: The speaker says, “Before I start today's sociology lecture,” which shows that the talk happens before the lecture begins.

d: At the end of the month
explanation: The speaker clearly states, “The paper itself is due in two weeks.”
The speaker says students should use “at least three books and at least three recent journal articles.”
The paper should include: 5 pages of composition, 1 title page, and 1 reference page. Total = 7 pages.
